The 2022 Russian invasion of Ukraine was a major political event in [[2022]] which led to the founding of the [[Church of Evolution]] 
[[Category:History]]
[[sn:2022 Russian invasion of Ukraine]][[Category:2022]]
[[Category:Meta-Crisis]]
[[sn:2022 Russian invasion of Ukraine]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
